title: End Caves
description: Datapack that creates End dimensions with    Cave generation, like the old world preset.
body:
# End Caves
This is Data Pack makes the End use Cave World generation from the old world preset. Terrain generates from 0 to 128, with a Bedrock roof and floor. All the end biomes and chorus fruit generate throughout the caves.

## Generation Notes
-  The End Fountain normally would always generate on the roof, to fix this, I made a hole through the roof at (0, 0)
- End Cities do not have configurable heights, so they generate on the roof
  - This is partially fine though, because End Gateways send you to the roof
    - When returning though, they also send you to the roof. This makes the hole at (0, 0) useful
- I may make a custom end city structure in the future, which will allow me to change their heights
